spec.name: A Side Street
spec.description: This small side street leads away from the garden path to the south. Around you stand large piles or rubble where the houses of commoners used to be. A lone howl makes you worry greatly about your safety here.

east.description: An unusually tall dwelling stands looming over you.

south.description: A garden path circles around the temple.

west.description: Here lies a small stone house with a thatched roof.
